book: Appended Note on the Eastern Editions of Synodical Literature.

classification.cautionReason: Conciliar or creedal material received in mainstream Nicene Christian tradition, with denominational differences on some canons.

lineage: Appended Note on the Eastern Editions of Synodical Literature.
Bibliograficeskij Ukazatel' Pecatnyh Izdanij Apostol'skih I Sobornyh Pravil Na Slavjanskom I Russkom Jazykah.
title: Bibliograficeskij Ukazatel' Pecatnyh Izdanij Apostol'skih I Sobornyh Pravil Na Slavjanskom I Russkom Jazykah.

verses.book: Appended Note on the Eastern Editions of Synodical Literature.
verses.text: V pravoslavnoj Russkoj Cerkvi izdanija sobornyh pravil i opredelenij soveršalis’ tol’ko po neposredstvennomu rasporjazeniju i soizvoleniju vysšej cerknovnoj vlasti i fakticeski izjaty iz kompetencii castnoj ucenoj predpriimcivosti.

verses.book: Appended Note on the Eastern Editions of Synodical Literature.
verses.text: Poetomu podrobnyja izdanija vypuskalis’ v Rossii liš’ po mere prakticeskoj potrebnosti.

verses.book: Appended Note on the Eastern Editions of Synodical Literature.
verses.text: (1) Pervoe po vremeni pecatnoe izdanie nazvannyh pravil bylo v slavjanskoj “Kormcej Knige” (=grec. Πηδάλιον ), kotoraja nacata pecataniem pri Moskovskom patriarhe Iosife v Moskve 7go oktjabrja 1649 g. i okoncena 1go ijulja 1650 g., no patr.

verses.book: Appended Note on the Eastern Editions of Synodical Literature.
verses.text: Nikon podverg ego sobornomu peresmotru, pri cem neškol’ko listov bylo perepecatano i vneseno vnov’.

verses.book: Appended Note on the Eastern Editions of Synodical Literature.
verses.text: Po semu ekzempljary etoj “Kormcej” byli razoslany po cerkvam dlja cerkovnago upotreblenija i postupili v obrascenie ne ranee 1653 g.

verses.book: Appended Note on the Eastern Editions of Synodical Literature.

verses.book: Appended Note on the Eastern Editions of Synodical Literature.
verses.text: Sinod ne redko privodil v svoih ukazah pravila po slavjanskoj redakcii “Kormcej knigi,” a potom rekomendoval Afinskoe izdanie “Sintagmy” dlja vseh duhovno-ucebnyh zavedenij.

verses.book: Appended Note on the Eastern Editions of Synodical Literature.
verses.text: Eto otkryvalo mesto dlja novoj obrabotki, kotoraja s razrešenija vysšej duhovnoj vlasti i byla predprinjata Moskovskim “Obšcestvom ljubitelej duhovnago prosvešcenija”.

verses.book: Appended Note on the Eastern Editions of Synodical Literature.
